underlying_goal: Build and iteratively refine a React Native/Expo pet health management app (PetsauLife) with features including biometric login, AI photo analysis, responsive UI, health records, and Supabase backend integration
friction_detail: Persistent issues with image handling (avatar display, AI photo analysis with base64/sizing errors), API 500 errors on sub-agent rewrites, and stale React state bugs required multiple fix attempts with some remaining unresolved.
brief_summary: User iteratively built a full-featured pet health app across a very long session; Claude successfully implemented many features (health records, responsive design, Edge Functions, UI cleanup) but left AI photo analysis broken and pet dashboard rewrite incomplete due to repeated errors.
